sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92792" key="r(uma/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῡμ-άρχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92792.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chief officer of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥύμη</foreign> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
